dict.string: Tap on the Multi-Tool and select the Plow Tool.
You don't want to know what's in those barrels.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
You pilfered Dr. Groundhog into poverty!
Defeat Dr. Groundhog to collect these items
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
No Zombie Farm is complete without a few gravestones.
Garden Zombies can fertilize your crops, making them worth double!
For the best results, invade with at least 16 zombies.
Try investing in blue or red zombies.
You beat The Dread Pirate Arrrnold 3 times!
Get a strong army of mutated and special zombies.
Buy the camera in the store under Functional Items.
Buy the camera in the store under Functional Items.
Buy the camera in the store under Functional Items.
Buy the camera in the store under Functional Items.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
You pilfered Loco Locust into poverty!
Defeat Loco Locust to collect these items
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
You completed Cook Up Some Zombies!
Experiment with the Zombie Pot to get these.
You completed Cook Up Some More Zombies!
Experiment with the Zombie Pot to get these.
You completed Plow Now Brown Cow!
Why settle for 50 when you can have 85?
You completed It's Plow Or Never!
Plots! Plots as far as the eye can see!
You can never have too many plots. Or maybe you can.
Now this is getting a bit silly.
Zombies love to stop and smell the roses.
Part robot. Part zombie. Not even a little bit cop.
This is an excellent start to your army.
You completed all of Bully Frog's Prize Cards!
Keep defeating Bully Frog to collect stamps.
This fertilizes better than the Garden Zombie.
This is much more cheerful than you might think.
The favored food for vegetarian zombies.
You completed A Fruit and a Spine!
This fast crop only takes 15 minutes to grow!
Create the most delicious of roads.
Love is in the air and on your farm.
Nothing says love more than creepy zombie cupids.
Having trouble? Buy a Zombie Monolith to get more reinforcements.
You beat the Easter Badger 3 times!
You don't want to know where the Easter Badger got these.
Need more room for zombies? Buy a mausoleum!
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
You pilfered Foul Owl into poverty!
Defeat Foul Owl to collect these items
Harvest crops to reveal the Enemy.
You completed all of Skunkarella's Prize Cards!
Keep defeating Skunkarella to collect stamps.
You completed all of Rocky Rhino's Prize Cards!
Keep defeating Rocky Rhino to collect stamps.
You completed Rocky Rhino's 2nd Stamp Card!
Keep defeating Rocky Rhino to collect stamps.
You completed Rocky Rhino's 3rd Stamp Card!
Keep defeating Rocky Rhino to collect stamps.
You completed all of General Larvaelus' Prize Cards!
Keep defeating General Larvaelus to collect stamps.
You completed all of Mystical Mamba's Prize Cards!
Keep defeating Mystical Mamba to collect stamps.
There sure are a lot of them.
You beat the Dairy King 3 times!
You collected all 3 ice cream cones!
Invade the Dairy King to win these!
Don't lose a single zombie in the fight.
Invade the Ringmaster to win these!
Don't lose a single zombie in the fight.
You beat Count von Uberbiss 3 times!
Invade Count von Uberbiss to win these!
These zombies are great front line fighters.
Don't lose a single zombie in the fight.
Tap on the plowed land to open the Market.
You can find these in the Mutants section of Zombies in the store.
You need a Zombie Pot to combine zombies. Buy it in the store.
These take a full day to grow.
This will take you at least a full day.
Be the envy of your neighborhood.
You completed An Apple a Day!
Find this in the Market in the Trees category under Crops.
This is a very fast crop.
This is a very fast crop.
You completed If Life Gives You Lemons!
This is a very fast crop.
Adding neighbors has never been easier!
You can Search, use Facebook, or even add random neighbors!
Make sure you Collect from your neighbors every day!
Tap on the house button in the neighbor list to visit!
Playing tag gives you both XP!
Visit a neighbor's farm to play tag.
Don't forget to give out 3 Brains every day!
You can give 3 Brains per day!
Thank You For Being A Friend
Make sure you have at least 8 zombies.
Use the plow tool to make more plowed soil.
Open the market or tap on plowed land to plant!
You completed Clean Up After Yerself!
You'll need these to create and fund your zombies.
To keep intruders out, or to keep zombies in?
